Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.plot

Interface ITimeElementEntity

All Known Implementing Classes:
JDTimeElementEntity, PhaseTimeElementEntity
public interface ITimeElementEntity
This interface must be implemented by any component wanting to be a source or sink of time element values (Julian Day, phase) from a list of observations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getDefaultTimeElementsInBin()
    Get the default time elements in a time bin.
    double
    getDefaultTimeIncrements()
    Get the default time increments or steps over a time bin range.
    double
    getMaxTimeIncrements(List<ValidObservation> meanSourceObs)
    Given a list of observations, return the maximum time increments or steps over a time bin range.
    String
    getNumberFormat()
    Get the desired DecimalNumber-style format.
    double
    getTimeElement(List<ValidObservation> obs, int index)
    Get the time element given an observation and an index.
    void
    setTimeElement(ValidObservation ob, double value)
    Set the time element on a specified observation.

  • Method Details

    • getTimeElement

      double getTimeElement(List<ValidObservation> obs, int index)
      Get the time element given an observation and an index.
      Parameters:
      obs - A list of observations.
      index - An index into the list.
      Returns:
      A time element from within the observation at the list index.

    • setTimeElement

      void setTimeElement(ValidObservation ob, double value)
      Set the time element on a specified observation.
      Parameters:
      ob - An observation.
      value - The value to be set.

    • getDefaultTimeElementsInBin

      double getDefaultTimeElementsInBin()
      Get the default time elements in a time bin.
      Returns:
      The default number of time elements per bin.

    • getDefaultTimeIncrements

      double getDefaultTimeIncrements()
      Get the default time increments or steps over a time bin range.
      Returns:
      The default time increment.

    • getMaxTimeIncrements

      double getMaxTimeIncrements(List<ValidObservation> meanSourceObs)
      Given a list of observations, return the maximum time increments or steps over a time bin range.
      Parameters:
      meanSourceObs - The list of observations that is the mean source.
      Returns:
      The maximum time increment.

    • getNumberFormat

      String getNumberFormat()
      Get the desired DecimalNumber-style format.
      Returns:
      The number format string.
